payload.label: wildfire
payload.rationale: FIRMS shows repeated 78MW FRP over 30 min. GEOINT/IMINT co-locate the heat source. SIGINT WIFIBT probes are local spillover, not combat pattern. No industrial/commercial signatures dominate.

payload.label: ambient
payload.rationale: GEOINT/IMINT show frp 10MW and small inflatable craft; MASINT/thermal detects person_warm. SIGINT WIFIBT Espressif probe_req is low-specificity consumer RF. No combat pattern, no industrial stack, no wildfire signature. Best fit: ambient maritime/shore activity.

payload.label: combat
payload.rationale: IMINT shows Type-022_FAC; MASINT detects engine_block; SIGINT shows DJI_OcuSync_2.4 and Samsung probe_req. Cross-INT proximity and timing fit military maritime activity, not commercial or ambient.

payload.label: combat
payload.rationale: HITUAV vessel wake, DRONERF Lightbridge_2.4, and ASAM boarding indicate active small-boat contact and possible tactical control. AIS fishing GAP may be spoofed/disabled. GEOINT, MASINT, and SIGINT align with maritime interdiction behavior; OSINT absent.

payload.label: ambiguous
payload.rationale: AIS cargo GAP plus ASAM approach/boarding and DRONERF 433MHz handheld telemetry suggest possible interdiction or boarding event. GEOINT/SIGINT show close temporal-spatial linkage, but no clear hostile, commercial, industrial, or wildfire signature.

payload.label: wildfire
payload.rationale: GEOINT/MASINT show HITUAV engine_block and FIRMS FRP 21MW co-located in time/space. SIGINT WIFIBT probe_req and TP-Link beacon support nearby civilian device activity, but the heat signature dominates. OSINT absent; pattern fits active fire, not combat or industrial.

payload.label: ambiguous
payload.rationale: GEOINT/FIRMS shows two FRP hits, but OSINT/ASAM reports a kidnap attempt and AIS fishing GAP is weak context. No clear combat pattern; mixed civil-maritime and fire cues keep the cluster ambiguous.

payload.label: industrial
payload.rationale: GEOINT shows a persistent FIRMS FRP 8MW near AIS tug and passenger pings within 2.2-4.1 km over 63-104 min. Pattern fits industrial heat source with nearby maritime support traffic; no combat or wildfire indicators.
